text.message: hey red, have we just met?
HwD what deal did y make to always get to go first?
you can give me all your cards in my turn :)
Can’t let green have any sheep spots
he will know what to do with them
sheep on the wrong hands is damgerous
such a weirdly defensive play ngl
sorry green, lack of grain made me send it
U don’t need to explain to him, do ur thang baby gurl
if the 5 grain had a better pairing than two low roll wood i woulda gone there
I have no bettor choice I guess
Red u wanna trade the brick
Sorry blue I thought red said yes
How u gonna give free card
gamble with being over 7 but yolo i guess
what are you doing on my land red?
sorry black, i dont even want to roll 7 anymore
i mean black i think u have the best position by far
it’s a 2 man game here u and nlue
Yeah best spots doesn’t mean win
ik, but no one is blocking me or green
i think u win long term 90% of the time here
black i don’t wanna do this with blue
Yeah blue def better now especially with that 6 loaded up
green hiding some devs up too
but 6 block is good, I don't want to move it
just don’t want me to get any wheat
i think everyones a lil dangerous
bruh green and i are not at all
you're at 6 vp's and holding 10 cards
how do i progress from here?
you're gonna build a settle on 10 grain and build cities with your load of rocks
my max score for the foreseeable future is 7
3 cities could fly by for ya once you get city on 8/4/3
did u try to use a mono?
only reason i accepted that is because u knighted at the start of the turn
black and blue how many VPs yall have?
if he has 4 vps it doesnt' matter if i target him here or not
i’m just letting blue know, i’m city road road settle from
Targeting the wrong guys work both ways?
that’s the first wheat i’ve generated all game lmao
should've offered a trade back, sorry
i have one of the vp's
but i knew you couldnt win that turn and i gotta get risky
gimme a wheat for that clutch block
clutch plays need to be rewarded
green did that five u win?
one of yall 2 have to win here
May the catan gods be with me
i’m just happy i made it to 8
I could have win last round, without that mono
only pops allowed from here on out
and 1 card short to victory, even after the mono
there have to be only vp left
May the catan gods be with me
